_comment: SafeWheels guest reviews from the Turo host profile (turo.com/us/en/drivers/795431). Turo blocks scraping, so reviews are maintained by hand here. After editing, run: node tools/build-reviews.js  (regenerates the on-site reviews section + star rich-snippet markup). date = ISO YYYY-MM-DD (used for Google structured data; displayed as 'Mon D, YYYY'). featured: true = shown as a card on the site (up to 6). summary.rating = overall Turo star rating; summary.reviewCount = total ratings on Turo.

reviews.name: Anthony
reviews.text: Awesome - will book again - thanks Alex!

reviews.name: Matthew
reviews.text: Painless experience, very good communication. Vehicle was very nice would use again.

reviews.name: Shideh
reviews.text: All in all an excellent experience, a good car and a very responsive host.

reviews.name: Christa
reviews.text: Thank you for making this so easy!

reviews.name: Aaron
reviews.text: Vehicle was clean and everything that we needed. Drop off and pickup was very easy and communication with host was great.

reviews.name: Maureen
reviews.text: Perfect little car in great shape. Host very easy to work with. Will rent from this host again.

reviews.name: Christopher
reviews.text: Great vehicle. Awesome Owner! A great experience. Thank you. It was a pleasure.

reviews.name: Emily
reviews.text: The car was perfect and the host was amazing! We changed the location of pickup last minute, had a delayed flight, needed to extend our trip and the host was very accommodating and responded immediately. I would definitely use them again!

reviews.name: Brett David
reviews.text: Amazing communication and great car.

reviews.name: Korbin
reviews.text: Great host. Nice car!

reviews.name: James
reviews.text: The car Alex provided was top-notch. Clean, great gas mileage and drove like a dream. Extremely reasonable price too! Wouldn't hesitate on this vehicle (or Alex) again! Pickup simply couldn't have been easier.

reviews.name: Jocelyn
reviews.text: The jeep was absolutely beautiful, we decided to change our flights and return times and the host was extremely helpful and accommodating, even offered to help us with getting another rental when we were thinking about staying on our vacation longer. Extremely satisfied with our experience and will book this Jeep again in the future. Beautiful jeep!

reviews.name: Dique'e
reviews.text: Everything was perfect, car was just as described. Clean and very nice to ride, host was very easy to communicate with, will definitely rent again.

reviews.name: Nicole
reviews.text: Great car and communication! Everything was exceptional! Car was immaculate and the car seat that was provided for my daughter was perfect. Would highly recommend!

reviews.name: James
reviews.text: Car and communication were great. Would rent again.

reviews.name: Mason
reviews.text: Experience was perfect, easy pick up, easy drop off. Clean, reliable car. Good vibes, good ride! Will use again!

reviews.name: Heather
reviews.text: Alex was very responsive. Our vehicle was in great condition.

reviews.name: Joseph
reviews.text: Alex made everything so smooth for our trip. Very nice vehicle!

reviews.name: Joseph
reviews.text: Very accommodating provider, I highly recommend. Great experience, will definitely rent again from this provider.

reviews.name: Shane
reviews.text: Great car, easy pick up, great communication with host.

reviews.name: Kevin
reviews.text: This experience was so smooth and seamless. The car was clean and drove well.

reviews.name: Eva
reviews.text: Everything went very smoothly!! Pickup information was detailed and simple and the car drove perfectly! Alex had reached out during my trip as well to make sure no issues came up! Would definitely rebook for my next trip!

reviews.name: Roy
reviews.text: All excellent.

reviews.name: Michael
reviews.text: Alex is a fantastic host! Nice car. Easy in and out. Awesome communication and directions from Alex.

reviews.name: Randy
reviews.text: Great experience! Vehicle was clean and well maintained. Pick up and drop off couldn't have been easier! A++

reviews.name: Daniel
reviews.text: Good car.

reviews.name: Andrew
reviews.text: Car was clean and on time. Pleasure to rent from.

reviews.name: Michele
reviews.text: Thanks again! Great vehicle and worked well for us.
